laws: FOUNDER_CANON v1 + governed-autorun v3. Violations = BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.

bands.band_rule: FL4 builds app manifests/drafts only; no service provisioning without its own founder point; production deploy absent from substrate (CF-P4+).
FL5 produces DRAFT workflow definitions only; activation is a separate founder-gated step (prompt L5 rules).
Read-only; every external claim carries per-URL status + body sha256 evidence (CLOUD_RESEARCH discipline).
Governance-zone writes reach main only via branch + PR through full repo fences; W2 wall applies.
Preview only. Production stays FOUNDER_ONLY outside the substrate (HARD_BLOCK reason 2).
FL8 PASS only from the secondary CF account edge receipt — never builder self-report (autonomy loop L3).

Offers/funnels as DRAFTS only — no sends, no pricing/legal/equity claims without founder approval (claim ladder VERIFIED/DECLARED/PLANNED). FL4 may substitute FL5 for app-shaped offers (justify in plan notes).
Client-facing copy requires founder approval before shipping; deliverables use the simple-web format (HTML page), never slide decks.
Patches land as PR from sandbox/factory/* branches; merge to main is a founder point through full fences.

Compiles + dry-runs ONLY. Activating any schedule is double-locked: FOUNDER-UNLOCK-CF-CRON + per-workflow founder activation (recurring_copilot_automation is forbidden today). cron_schedule stays in forbidden_actions regardless of eligibility.

growth_law: Plans enter as draft via FL10 harvest or architect order; a founder receipt ratifies seed -> testing -> active; plan_version immutable once active; two versions never active at once; retired plans are never deleted. No self-promotion to active (RF fence precedent). Library capacity is 1000 ids, banded 100 per plan_type.
seed_note: EXACTLY 30 seed records — the first three ids of each band — every record complete against PLAN_SCHEMA_v1, status seed, auto_dispatch.eligible false. Seeds are design records, not ratified plans; nothing here is built, active, or verified.
